title: Comrades: Almost a Love Story (SoL)
synopsis: Maggie Cheung’s hustler from Guangzhou moves to Hong Kong determined to get rich. Leon Lai’s rube from Tianjin migrates to Hong Kong to earn enough money to marry the girl back home. When the two immigrants meet by chance, they strike up an alliance that grows into friendship, and then friendship becomes something much more fun and complicated. Peter Chan’s epic 1996 romantic comedy Comrades: Almost a Love Story depicts a cosmopolitan Hong Kong full of romantic potential for working people.

synopsis_lang.en: Maggie Cheung’s hustler from Guangzhou moves to Hong Kong determined to get rich. Leon Lai’s rube from Tianjin migrates to Hong Kong to earn enough money to marry the girl back home. When the two immigrants meet by chance, they strike up an alliance that grows into friendship, and then friendship becomes something much more fun and complicated. Peter Chan’s epic 1996 romantic comedy Comrades: Almost a Love Story depicts a cosmopolitan Hong Kong full of romantic potential for working people.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 古古惑惑的張曼玉從廣州來港，決心飛黃騰達；結結巴巴的黎明來自天津，一心儲錢迎娶家鄉女友。兩個新移民萍水相逢，由拍檔成為朋友，由朋友再變得更趣味盎然錯綜複雜。陳可辛執導的史詩式浪漫喜劇《甜蜜蜜》在1996年上映，戲內的香港是一個普羅大眾都可以浪漫起來的大都會。

cast: Leon Lai, Maggie Cheung, Eric Tsang, Kristy Yeung

cast_lang.en: Leon Lai, Maggie Cheung, Eric Tsang, Kristy Yeung
cast_lang.zh_hk: 黎明、張曼玉、曾志偉、楊恭如

subtitle: Chinese,English
